[INFORMASI KONTEKS VISUAL GAMBAR]:
- Deskripsi Visual: The image shows large black text on a white background reading “jngan sia' kn yang demi sempurna setia yang sia tng” with parts spaced across two lines.

Main Subject:
The main visual focus is bold, black, sans-serif text occupying most of the frame.

Setting:
The setting is a plain white background with no visible environment details, appearing like a cropped text graphic or subtitle.

Visual Details:
The text is split into two main regions across the image, with some characters missing or partially cut off at the edges. The font is thick and high-contrast, and the text is aligned left-to-right with irregular spacing and line breaks due to cropping.

Visible Text:
jngan sia' kn
yang demi
sempurna setia
yang sia tng

Practical Summary:
This image is a close-up view of large black text on a white background. The visible wording appears incomplete or partially cropped.

Pertanyaan asli user: Analyze this image for NSFW (Not Safe For Work) / pornographic content / nudity. Reply strictly in JSON format with three fields: 'nsfw' (boolean: true if it contains nudity, porn, suggestive, or nsfw content, false if it is safe/sfw), 'confidence' (number: from 0 to 100 representing the likelihood of nsfw/nudity/suggestive content), and 'label' (string: 'porn', 'nsfw', 'suggestive', or 'safe' depending on the content). Do not include markdown formatting or backticks, just raw JSON.
